headline: Competitive analysis complete: AutoReport scores 89/100 vs. 10 competitors; identified 5 differentiation opportunities
highlights: Analyzed 10 competitors across 7 dimensions (ease of use, speed, integrations, pricing, visualization, automation, support)
Whatagraph (79.5/100) is closest competitor; AutoReport wins on agency-specific workflows, customization, and transparency

5 defensible differentiation opportunities identified: (1) fastest setup for non-technical users, (2) multi-channel consolidation templates, (3) error-proof data validation, (4) agency operations automation, (5) transparent pricing
Core competitive advantage: AutoReport owns 'end-to-end agency reporting workflow' that no competitor fully addresses
Positioning opportunity: 'The operating system for agency reporting' — consolidates data, dashboards, team coordination, and billing
Time savings advantage: 5-minute setup vs. Whatagraph's 30 minutes and Supermetrics' 4-6 hours
Market gaps identified: Pre-built multi-channel templates (no competitor has them), accuracy SLA (none offered), transparent ROI pricing (all competitors opaque)

next_actions.label: Build landing page with competitive positioning comparison
Create ROI calculator with transparent pricing model
Validate positioning with 10 cold outreach emails
